productDisplayName: Fila Men Destiny Grey Sports Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Destiny shoe comes in a sleek design, making this a great buy.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations all overLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleEVA midsole for comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPU outsole textured with a decoupled, scooped heel with an impact guidance lineGeometric grooves with a cirved midfootShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
